[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Arkeld''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]], before he became infamous for leading a cell of the [[Justice Action Network]]—an anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] terrorist group—on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]]. Arkeld was known as a gifted speaker, and often denounced the tyranny of the Empire. By the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he had nearly forty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of research and teaching experience.<ref name="LOTE" />

{{Char-stub}}
